channel.title: Security on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: System Status Snapshot Cpu Ram Disk Ports
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: One-command system status snapshot: load/CPU, RAM, disk usage, listening ports, and top processes—run in a minimal Docker lab for repeatable results.

item.title: chmod vs chown: The Practical Differences Explained
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn the real differences between chmod and chown, how each affects Linux file permissions, and the exact scenarios where they fix permission errors.

item.title: Exploring Cybersecurity with Python: Advanced Topics and Practical Examples
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Dive into advanced cybersecurity topics with Python, learn practical examples, and enhance your skills. #cybersecurity #python

item.title: Creating Secure and Random Passwords with Python
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn how to generate secure and random passwords using Python. Read this code blog and enhance your password security!

item.title: Random Password Generator
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Introducing the Random Password Generator project! Generate secure and unique passwords with Python. Safeguard your accounts and data effortlessly.
